fields.label: Status
fields.options:
Pending
ExportingSnapshot
TargetPreparing
InjectingIdentity
Hydrating
CutoverStarting
Repointing
Cleanup
Done
Failed

fields.description: Live, always-current line describing exactly what the migration is doing right now (which host, which step). Stamped by advance_migration BEFORE each phase runs, and refined by long sub-steps as they progress.
fields.label: Progress

fields.description: Percent complete of the current long-running copy (base-image ship or disk hydration); -1 when the current phase is not a measurable copy.
fields.label: Progress %

fields.description: Denormalized from the VM at insert. Immutable.
fields.label: Source Server

fields.description: The VM's IPv6 on the source (history). Released implicitly once server flips.
fields.label: IPv6 Address (old)

fields.description: Allocated from the target server's range during InjectingIdentity (change-address path).
fields.label: IPv6 Address (new)

fields.description: Operator acknowledgment that an attached public IPv4 will be released (inbound v4 changes across the move).
fields.label: Release Reserved IP

fields.description: 1 iff the VM keeps its /128 across the move (the source host keeps forwarding it). Computed at insert from the provider's vm_range_is_forwardable capability. When 0, the migration takes the change-address path (new /128 + proxy re-point).
fields.label: Keep Address

fields.description: 1 iff the keep-address mechanism must re-assert proxy-NDP on the source at cutover (DigitalOcean); 0 for a routed-prefix provider (Scaleway), where NDP is a no-op. Always 0 when keep_address is 0.
fields.label: Forward Address (proxy-NDP)

fields.description: Observability of the live forwarding path. On the keep-address path this reaches Forwarding at Cleanup and stays there until the operator collapses the forward.
fields.label: Tunnel Status

fields.description: Mirrors tunnel_status == Forwarding as a simple predicate for the dashboard indicator and to gate the Collapse-forward action.
fields.label: Forward Active

fields.description: The mig6-<vm8> tunnel interface name on both hosts (teardown / lost-task re-entry handle). Derived from the VM UUID.
fields.label: Tunnel Device

fields.description: TCP port the source NBD server binds; derived from the VM UUID.
fields.label: NBD Port

fields.description: The source root disk's ACTUAL byte size (blockdev), recorded at export. The target disk is created at least this large so a grown disk isn't truncated during hydration (spec/19 §5). Long Int — a disk byte count overflows a 32-bit Int.
fields.label: Root Disk Bytes

fields.description: The source data disk's actual byte size (0 if none). Sizes the target data disk like root_disk_bytes.
fields.label: Data Disk Bytes

fields.description: Local-image path only (spec/19 §5.1): tracks shipping the VM's un-syncable base image to the target during TargetPreparing. Empty when the base was already present (a synced image, or a re-entry after the ship finished).
fields.label: Base Ship State

fields.description: Percent of the base-image copy complete (local-image path only).
fields.label: Base Ship %

fields.description: Consecutive no-progress hydration polls; the phase fails past a threshold.
fields.label: Hydration Stall Ticks

fields.description: The phase the migration was in when it failed; retry() resumes here.
fields.label: Error At Status
